title: Songkhla Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Songkhla with a Z-Score of +3.51. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.3 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 75%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 5.1 km/h, which is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the population.
